description:
👉 Free Spanish Study Guide:  https://mydailyspanish.com/study-guide-youtube/ 
🛑 Feeling stuck in your Spanish? Check our Program: 👉  https://mydailyspanish.com/spanish-accelerator-program/

¡Bienvenidos a My Daily Spanish!
If you're looking for fun and effective Spanish practice, you're in the right place!
This channel is packed with Spanish videos for intermediate learners, from real-life vlogs with subtitles (Spanish + English!) to comprehensible input, grammar breakdowns, real conversations, quizzes, and learning tips from your favorite native Spanish teacher. 🇪🇸 

Subscribe now and make Spanish part of your daily life — this is the fuel you need to become fluent!

In this video, I have €10 to eat for a whole day in Spain (specifically in Seville).
What will I be able to eat? Will I starve? 😅
Learn Spanish with me through this little adventure — with subtitles in both Spanish and English!
(You can turn on the English subtitles by clicking the CC button.)

I hope you enjoyed this Spanish vlog and learned a lot from it!

Leave a comment if you liked it — I’ll be checking them out ♥️

Thanks so much for watching and learning with us! 😊

▬▬▬▬▬▬ SOCIAL MEDIA ▬▬▬▬▬▬
✨Instagram https://www.instagram.com/holamydailyspanish/ 
✨TikTok https://www.tiktok.com/@mydailyspanish 

👁️Visit our website and have a look at our blog and offers: https://mydailyspanish.com/ 

😘Que tengáis un buen día 😘


CHAPTERS:
00:00 Can I eat with just €10 a day?
00:34 Organizing the budget 
00:58 Looking for a cheap breakfast
05:47 Dreaming about winning the lottery
06:38 A free Spanish Study Guide for you
07:12 Looking for a bathroom 
07:56 Looking for lunch
09:39 Hunting for the best afternoon snack
11:48 Heading to the supermarket for dinner 
15:28 Time for my merienda
16:13 Dinner time
16:58 Recap of all the expenses
17:56 Did I get rich with the lottery ticket?
18:43 How much does it cost to live in Spain?

#SpanishLanguage #LearnSpanish #mydailyspanish
